parts.name: Straight Line Internal Connectors (20-Series)
parts.description: In-slot connector bars for modular X-direction 2m members. M3-2 uses 3 butt joints x 4 connector bars per joint = 12 total. Bars fit inside the top and bottom V-slots across each joint and clamp with two set screws on either side. These are alignment aids, not the primary stiffness or centering method: SN 001 can flex this joint under gravity with connector bars alone. Each 2m X-direction splice is therefore centered and reinforced by a 1000mm 2040 insert friction-fit inside the 4080 C-Beam and held with printed retainers (id 65/id 85). The 2040 insert also avoids relying on steel set screws as the primary centering feature, reducing galvanic-corrosion concern at the joint. Stagger splice locations across parallel rails to avoid aligned weak planes. For M3-1: qty 0.

suppliers.notes: 20-series straight line connector bar, 100mm, with M5 set screws. Alignment aid only; 2040 insert provides primary centering/stiffness.
2020/20-series straight connector bar. Use 4 per 2m X-direction joint.
20-series internal connector bar. Use 4 per 2m X-direction joint.
Internal connector bars, 20-series compatible. Use 4 per 2m X-direction joint.

parts.name: T-Slot Drop-In Nuts M5 (20-Series)
parts.description: 300 total — M5 is the standard fastener for 4080 C-beam (20-series compatible 6mm slot width). Spring-loaded drop-in style recommended for easier assembly. NOT M6 — M6 is for 40-series only.

parts.name: Eccentric Spacers (V-Slot)
parts.description: One per wheel, all 32 positions (2026-04-23: eccentric on every wheel for maximum preload adjustability on prototype). 6mm tall, 10mm OD, 6mm bore, off-center. Adds 6mm of axial offset along the bolt axis only — zero protrusion in the travel direction. Stack per wheel: M5 bolt -> plate -> eccentric spacer (6mm) -> V-wheel -> 6mm plain spacer (id 83) -> washer -> lock nut. NOTE: check all wheels for inner bearing spacer between the two 625ZZ races — missing inner spacer causes axial wheel slop.

suppliers.notes: Eccentric spacer for V-Slot (6mm bore, 10mm OD)

parts.name: Adjustable Leveling Feet M16
parts.description: Critical for leveling on uneven job-site floors. 1000lb-rated per foot. NOTE: M16 thread will not fit directly into 4080 C-beam slot — requires printed or CNC base plates to interface with frame.

parts.name: NEMA23 Stepper Motor (X-axis, 8mm shaft)
parts.description: MUST be 8mm shaft variant to match pulleys and couplers. TMC5160 StallGuard for sensorless homing. 3Nm minimum torque recommended.

parts.name: GT2 Timing Belt 10mm (Y-axis, 2x ~2.5m loops)
parts.description: Y-axis motion belts, 10mm reinforced GT2

parts.name: GT2 Pulley 20-Tooth (8mm Bore, all axes)
parts.description: Drive and idler pulleys — MUST match motor shaft diameter (8mm). Metal recommended for belt tooth engagement under load. Aluminum or steel.

parts.name: X-Axis Carriage Plate Assembly
parts.description: Carries the 1.5kg printhead. Print saves $70+ with CF-Nylon/ABS. Must be compatible with 4080 C-beam rail width. Hose is counter-weighted to reduce gantry loading.

suppliers.notes: V-Slot Gantry Bundle - ships from US warehouse

parts.name: NEMA23 Stepper Motor (Y-axis, 8mm shaft)
parts.description: Dual motors for anti-racking — TMC5160 StallGuard compatible. MUST be 8mm shaft variant. Both Y motors must be identical model for matched steps/mm.

parts.name: GT2 Timing Belt 6mm (X-axis, 1x ~2.4m fixed strand)
parts.description: X-axis belt-pinion drive. Uses 6mm GT2 because the X belt must fit inside the gantry slot; do not substitute the 10mm belt used on Y/Z here.

suppliers.notes: Source 6mm GT2 for X-axis only; 10mm stock is for Y/Z belts.
Source 6mm GT2 for X-axis only; 10mm stock is for Y/Z belts.
Source 6mm GT2 for X-axis only; 10mm stock is for Y/Z belts.

parts.name: V-Groove Wheels (Polycarbonate)
parts.description: 32 total confirmed from SN 001 physical assembly (2026-04-23). Breakdown: Z 4x4=16 + Y 2x4=8 + X double-plate 2x4=8. Polycarbonate (Xtreme/Solid) for heavy gantry loads.

parts.name: Y-Axis Gantry Plates
parts.description: Connects gantry beam to Y-rail carriages. Current design target is the same 125x125mm C-Beam gantry plate geometry used across Y/Z/X where practical; 3D-print prototype allowed. Common plate standard reduces SKU count and supports component swaps.

suppliers.notes: V-Slot Gantry Bundle - ships from US warehouse

parts.name: NEMA23 Stepper Motor (Z-axis, 8mm shaft)
parts.description: Four independent motors for auto-tramming via Klipper Z_TILT_ADJUST. 8mm shaft to match pulleys. Belt-driven Z — same motor type as X/Y for full parts commonality.

parts.name: GT2 Timing Belt 10mm (Z-axis, 4x ~2.5m loops)
parts.description: Belt-driven Z - same GT2 10mm belt as Y-axis; X-axis remains 6mm to fit the gantry slot. ~3m per Z corner (up + down run + tensioner), 12m total for 4 independent Z drives. Belts shed concrete splatters unlike lead screw threads.

suppliers.notes: Gates PowerGrip GT2 10mm - same as Y; X uses 6mm.

parts.name: Z-Axis Carriage Plates
parts.description: Connects gantry frame to V-wheel carriages on vertical posts. 4 plates (one per corner). Current design target is the same 125x125mm C-Beam gantry plate geometry used across Y/Z/X where practical; must mount V-wheels + belt clamp.

suppliers.notes: V-Slot Gantry Bundle - ships from US warehouse

parts.name: Z-Axis Motor Mounts (integrated 3D-printed corner brackets)
parts.description: No purchased Z motor brackets in the current reference design. Z motor mounting is integrated into the printed combined corner bracket/post cap/spacer with belt clearance (see id 75). Print in PETG for prototype or CCF for production.

suppliers.notes: Print as part of the combined corner bracket. Do not purchase metal NEMA23 L-brackets for SN 001.
Legacy reference only; current design prints the mounts.
Legacy reference only; current design prints the mounts.

parts.name: BTT Kraken Mainboard
parts.description: 8 stepper drivers (TMC5160) — perfect for this build: X + 2×Y + 4×Z + Extruder. StallGuard sensorless homing on all axes.

parts.name: Raspberry Pi 5 (8GB RAM)
parts.description: Runs Klipper firmware. 8GB recommended for large print files.

parts.name: 7-inch Touchscreen Display
parts.description: User interface for printer control via KlipperScreen.

parts.name: Power Supply 24V 600W
parts.description: MeanWell for reliability. 600W handles 7 NEMA23 steppers + accessories. 24V bus for Kraken + peripherals.

parts.name: Emergency Stop Button
parts.description: Critical safety component. NC (normally-closed) contacts — pressing opens the circuit and kills 24V via contactor.

parts.name: Cable Drag Chain (Sealed)
parts.description: Enclosed/sealed type for concrete dust protection. X-axis: 25x50mm ID, 2.5m (M3-2 travel). Y-axis: 25x38mm ID, 1.3m. Open-style chains will clog with concrete dust. igus E2 micro series is ideal for dusty environments.

suppliers.notes: E2 micro sealed drag chain — premium, dust-proof

parts.name: Shielded Motor Cable - Flex-Rated (18AWG 4C)
parts.description: 4-conductor 18AWG, foil shield + drain, silicone jacket, continuous-flex drag-chain-rated. For X, Y, and extruder motors on moving axes. M3-2 X-axis travel requires ~2m more than M3-1. Critical for reliable StallGuard sensorless homing.

parts.name: Shielded Motor Cable - Static (18AWG 4C)
parts.description: 4-conductor 18AWG, foil shield + drain, PVC jacket, UL2464. For 4 stationary Z-axis motors. Shield drain connects at controller end only (star ground).

suppliers.notes: Alpha Wire or Belden UL2464 shielded 4C 18AWG

parts.name: GX16-4 Aviation Connector Sets
parts.description: Quick-disconnect for all 8 stepper motors. IP65 when mated — critical for concrete dust protection. Panel-mount female + inline male per set. Apply dielectric grease at assembly.

parts.name: Power Wire — 12AWG Silicone (Red + Black)
parts.description: PSU 24V output to BTT Kraken main power input. 12AWG handles 25A max draw at 600W/24V. Also used for E-stop contactor power loop.

parts.name: Distribution Wire — 18AWG (Red + Black)
parts.description: 24V branch distribution, accessory power, E-stop signal loop. For internal control panel wiring.

parts.name: Ferrule Crimping Tool + Assortment Kit
parts.description: Every stranded wire into a screw terminal MUST have a ferrule — critical in high-vibration concrete printer. Expect to use ~100 ferrules.

suppliers.notes: IWISS or Wirefy ratcheting crimper + ferrule kit

parts.name: IEC C14 Power Inlet w/ EMI Filter & Fuse
parts.description: Panel-mount AC inlet with integrated EMI filter, fuse holder (6A slow-blow for 120V), and rocker switch. Single mains entry point.

suppliers.notes: Schaffner or Qualtek IEC inlet w/ filter

parts.name: 24V Safety Contactor / Relay
parts.description: E-stop cuts 24V power via this contactor. NC E-stop loop controls the coil. 30A contacts minimum for 600W PSU output.

parts.name: 24V-to-5V DC-DC Buck Converter (5A)
parts.description: Powers Raspberry Pi 5 and touchscreen from the 24V bus. RPi 5 draws up to 5A with peripherals. Use dedicated converter, NOT Kraken 5V output.

parts.name: DIN-Rail Terminal Block Kit + Rail
parts.description: 10-position terminal blocks, DIN-rail end clamps (plastic clips that hold terminal blocks in place — NOT motion endstops; M3-CRETE uses TMC5160 StallGuard sensorless homing), jumper bars, and 0.5m 35mm DIN rail. Star-ground bus bar for all shield drain wires.

parts.name: Nylon Cable Gland Assortment
parts.description: IP68 cable glands for every wire entering the control panel. Prevents concrete dust ingress. Mount on bottom/sides only. Sizes: PG7-PG13.5.

parts.name: Snap-On Ferrite Cores (13mm ID)
parts.description: One per stepper motor cable at the controller end. Suppresses EMI that interferes with StallGuard sensorless homing.

parts.name: Cable Sleeving, Labels & Tie Kit
parts.description: 10m PET braided sleeving (1/2" + 1/4"), 100x UV-resistant cable ties, 30x screw-mount bases, self-laminating wire labels. Label both ends: M1-X, M2-YL, M3-YR, M4-Z1..M7-Z4, M8-EXT.

suppliers.notes: PET sleeving + cable tie + label bundle

parts.name: Progressive Cavity Pump
parts.description: REFERENCE ONLY — not included in M3-CRETE motion system kit. The concrete extrusion system operates at high pressure and requires commercial-grade components. Proven options include progressive cavity pump systems from established manufacturers. Contact Sunnyday Technologies for current recommendations.

suppliers.notes: MAI 2PUMP PICTOR-3D — 0.7-15.5 L/min, grain up to 2mm, analog 0-10V control. Industry standard for research and startups.
M-Tec P20 3DCP — 3-24 L/min, grain up to 4mm, Modbus-RTU control. Higher throughput for large-format printing.
Automated concrete pump — up to 10 L/min, 40 bar, aggregates up to 6mm. Includes operator training.
INTEREST CHECK — stepper-driven PC pump using NEMA23 + external driver + Kraken stepper signal. Need 10 commitments for a small production batch.

parts.name: External Stepper Driver — TMC5160 (48V High Current)
parts.description: Drives geared pump motor via Kraken STEP/DIR/EN signals. External driver recommended: higher current (6A) and 48V for more torque. SPI enables StallGuard for material blockage alarm.

suppliers.notes: BTT TMC5160 Pro V1.2 — 48V, external MOSFETs, SPI.

parts.name: Progressive Cavity Pump Element (Rotor + Stator)
parts.description: Core pumping element — chrome-plated SS rotor inside elastomer stator. For mortar/concrete with aggregates up to 2-6mm. Stator: Buna Nitrile (NBR) for concrete, EPDM for alkaline. Expect stator replacement every 200-500 hours.

suppliers.notes: Aftermarket replacement rotors and stators for Moyno, Seepex, Netzsch, Continental.
BN series — industrial PC pump. US distributors: Tencarva, Edelmann, Cummins-Wagner.
INTEREST CHECK — small-batch custom rotor+stator. CNC SS rotor + cast NBR stator. Need 10 commitments.
CP22 pump — 0.4-4.9 GPM, 100 PSI, 3/4" NPT, chrome SS rotor, Buna stator. Smallest US-made PC pump. Call 636-456-6006.

parts.name: Pump Drive Coupling — Universal Joint + Connecting Rod
parts.description: Converts motor rotation to rotor orbital motion. PC pump rotors orbit eccentrically — a rigid shaft will break. Use gear-type universal joint or double-cardan joint.

suppliers.notes: Miniature universal joints + flex couplings. Match bore sizes to motor output and rotor drive shaft.
Stainless steel universal joint couplers (8-14mm bores) + jaw couplings.
CNC or metal SLS custom connecting rod. STL files in repo /cad/pump/ directory.

parts.name: Pump Housing & Bearing Assembly
parts.description: Encloses rotor/stator and provides bearing support. Must handle axial thrust. If using Continental CP22, housing is included. For DIY: CNC aluminum + sealed bearings.

suppliers.notes: CP22 housing included with pump purchase.
DIY: Flanged ball bearings (sealed, SS) + Schedule 40 SS pipe as stator housing.
3D printed PETG prototype housing for testing only — concrete slurry is abrasive.

parts.name: 48V Power Supply for Pump Driver (Optional)
parts.description: Only needed if running external TMC5160 pump driver at 48V. Mean Well LRS-200-48 provides dedicated 48V for the geared stepper. Not needed if running pump from Kraken onboard driver at 24V.

suppliers.notes: Mean Well 48V PSU — also on Amazon Prime

parts.name: Material Hopper 20-Liter
parts.description: Material reservoir above the pump. HDPE or stainless for concrete compatibility. Printable in PETG for testing.

parts.name: Concrete Nozzle Assembly
parts.description: Critical for print quality. Replaceable-tip design recommended for different layer widths (20-40mm).

parts.name: Tubing & Quick Fittings
parts.description: Pump to nozzle material flow. Reinforced hose rated for concrete slurry. Counter-weighted to reduce gantry loading.

parts.name: M5 Socket Head Cap Screws
parts.description: Primary structural fasteners for 4080 C-beam frame (20-series compatible slots). M5 is the standard for 6mm slot width.

parts.name: M3 Socket Head Cap Screws
parts.description: Electronics mounting and small parts. ~50 needed: Kraken (4), Pi 5 (4), buck converters (12), fans (8), DIN rail (12), misc brackets (10).

parts.name: Washers & Lock Washers Assorted
parts.description: Prevent loosening from vibration. Nord-Lock recommended for structural joints.

parts.name: Heat-Set Inserts M3/M5
parts.description: Essential for threaded connections in 3D printed parts.

parts.name: Polycarbonate Enclosure Panels
parts.description: Dust containment for indoor use. Sized to frame dimensions.

suppliers.notes: Clear polycarbonate sheets — cut to size

parts.name: LED Work Lighting
parts.description: Work area illumination — 24V LED strips powered from main bus.

parts.name: Camera Module for Monitoring
parts.description: Remote print monitoring via KlipperScreen or Mainsail.

parts.name: HEPA Air Filtration
parts.description: Concrete dust particle capture for indoor operation.

parts.name: X-Direction Internal Reinforcement (centered 2040 insert)
parts.description: One 1000mm 2040 V-slot insert is friction-fit inside each 2m 4080 C-Beam X-direction member, centered on the butt joint so it spans 500mm on either side. Printed end retainers hold the insert in place; no adhesive is required for the current SN 001 method. The insert provides the primary centering and stiffness at the splice; the smaller in-slot connector bars (id 5) remain alignment aids only and can flex under gravity by themselves. The 2040 insert doubles the central internal features of the C-Beam at the highest-risk splice zone while preserving exterior carriage clearance and reducing reliance on steel set screws at the joint. Earlier analysis claimed less than 0.5mm flex under a 5kg load; SN 001 physical validation shows actual flex is far below that conservative claim. M3-1: not required. M3-2: qty 3 for the three spliced 2m X-direction members.

suppliers.notes: 2040 V-slot aluminum extrusion, 1000mm insert centered across each 2m C-Beam butt joint.
2040 V-slot, 1000mm insert centered across each 2m C-Beam butt joint.
2040 V-slot, 1000mm insert centered across each 2m C-Beam butt joint.
Printed end retainers hold the friction-fit 2040 insert in position; adhesive is not part of the current method.

parts.name: Idler Pulley Mounting Plate
parts.description: 3D-printed idler plates for belt return/tension points: 4x Z-axis + 2x Y-axis = 6 total. X-axis uses the 6mm gantry belt path and does not use this common idler plate line. Printed design carries the smooth idler pulley mount and tension feature.

suppliers.notes: Reference commercial option only; SN 001 uses 3D-printed idler plates.
Reference commercial option only; SN 001 uses 3D-printed idler plates.
Reference commercial option only; SN 001 uses 3D-printed idler plates.
SN 001 source of truth: print 6 total plates in PETG/CF-Nylon.

parts.name: C-beam 40×80 × 1000 mm — Frame Member (SDT Standard)
parts.description: The M3-CRETE reference frame is a single primary extrusion SKU: C-Beam 40x80 aluminum extrusion cut to 1000mm, quantity 17 reference pieces plus 1 spare for a total order of 18. This is the SDT (Sunnyday Technologies) standard: all primary frame members use 4080 C-Beam, no mixed frame extrusion profiles, no 1200mm stock, no 1500mm stock. The 1000mm length is the longest extrusion that fits a standard UPS/FedEx 42-inch parcel box, which gates whether a kit can ship ground or requires pallet freight. The 17 reference pieces make up: 4 Z-posts, 3 top Y-rails, 2 bottom Y-skids, 2 mid-height Y-gantry rails, 4 top X-rails spliced at center for the 2000mm X-direction spans, and 2 mid X cross-braces spliced at center. Spliced 2m X-direction members use the centered 2040 internal reinforcement insert and printed retainers (id 65/id 85). See https://m3-crete.com/blog/m3-2-full-cad-release/ for the full design rationale.

suppliers.notes: Factory-direct from China, DDP sea freight 30-35 days. Stocks 100-1500 mm in 50 mm increments. Select 1000 mm at checkout.
US domestic warehouse, Atoka OK. UPS Ground ~3 days. Stocks 1000 mm, 1500 mm, and 2400 mm (2400 mm requires freight quote). Select 1000 mm Black C-Beam at checkout.
Houston TX warehouse, US domestic ground ship. Stocks 1000 mm and 1200 mm pre-cut lengths. Select 1000 mm at checkout.

parts.name: Common 125x125 C-Beam Gantry Plate (Y/Z candidate)
parts.description: Y/Z carriage plate candidate using the same 125x125mm C-Beam gantry plate geometry across the machine where practical. 4x Z-corner + 2x Y-gantry = 6 total. This replaces the previous smaller-standard-vs-XLarge split and is intended to reduce total part count while allowing component swaps. Fit-check on SN 001 before freezing.

suppliers.notes: Common 125x125mm C-Beam gantry plate candidate; avoid 125x170 XLarge unless explicitly re-approved.
Common 125x125mm C-Beam gantry plate candidate; verify wheel pattern before purchase.

parts.name: Common 125x125 C-Beam Gantry Plate (X-axis pair)
parts.description: X-axis double-plate carriage pair using the same 125x125mm C-Beam gantry plate geometry targeted across Y/Z/X. 2 plates total (double-plate sandwich on the 2m gantry beam, 4 wheels each = 8 X-axis wheels). Do not use the 125x170mm XLarge plate path unless explicitly re-approved; the common plate strategy reduces total part count and supports component swaps.

suppliers.notes: 125x125mm C-Beam gantry plate; avoid 125x170mm XLarge unless explicitly re-approved.
125x125mm C-Beam gantry plate equivalent; verify dimensions before purchase.

parts.name: Combined Corner Bracket (motor mount + cap + spacer + belt slot, 3D printed)
parts.description: Single printed part at each Z-post corner. Combines motor mount plate, post cap, and Y-rail spacer into one piece. Includes 12x22mm belt slot for GT2 belt clearance through the cap section. NEMA23 bolt pattern. 80x44x102mm. Print in PETG (prototype) or CCF (production). CAD: CAD/Custom/Corner_Bracket_Combined.step

suppliers.notes: 3D print in PETG (8mm walls, prototype) or CCF (3-4mm, production). STL generated from CadQuery script.

parts.name: Expanded Center T-Bracket (spreader junction, 3D printed)
parts.description: Large T-bracket at center Y-spreader / X-rail junctions. 280x160x4mm, 17 M5 holes aligned to C-beam slot centerlines. Grabs both the spreader end and the adjacent X-rail sections for full junction rigidity. CAD: CAD/Custom/Center_T_Bracket_Expanded.step

suppliers.notes: 3D print in PETG (8mm walls, prototype) or CCF (3-4mm, production). STL generated from CadQuery script.

parts.name: Bottom Spacer/Idler Mount (4mm, combined, 3D printed)
parts.description: Combined bottom spacer and idler axle mount. 4mm x 80mm x 100mm plate on the Y-face of each bottom Z-post corner. Includes 8mm idler axle hole. Replaces both the bottom 4mm shim and the separate idler bracket. Sunnyday green. Print in PETG or CCF.

suppliers.notes: 3D print in PETG (8mm walls, prototype) or CCF (3-4mm, production). STL generated from CadQuery script.

parts.name: Y-Motor Adapter Plate (NEMA23, 3D printed)
parts.description: Flat adapter plate between Y-axis NEMA23 motor and C-beam face. 80x80x4mm with dual hole pattern: NEMA23 bolt pattern (47.14mm PCD) and 4x M5 extrusion slot mounting holes. Print in PETG or CCF.

parts.name: Legacy Frame Splice Backup Plate (6mm aluminum, optional)
parts.description: Legacy optional external backup plate for a 2m X-direction splice. Current SN 001 method uses the centered 2040 friction-fit internal insert with printed retainers (id 65/id 85), so this exterior plate is not part of the reference kit unless a later load case explicitly requires it.

suppliers.notes: 6mm (1/4 in nominal) aluminum flat bar, cut to length, ships from Kentucky
6061-T6 aluminum flat plate, various stock sizes

parts.name: V-Wheel Axle Spacers 6mm (plain cylindrical)
parts.description: One per wheel, outboard of wheel between wheel face and washer/lock nut. 6mm tall, ~10mm OD, 5.1mm bore (M5 clearance). Measured on SN 001 assembly 2026-04-23: 5mm to reach track + 1mm running gap = 6mm required. Full wheel stack: M5 bolt -> plate -> eccentric spacer (id 7, 6mm) -> V-wheel -> THIS spacer (6mm) -> washer -> lock nut. All 32 wheel positions. 60 ordered for SN 001 (surplus covers spares and inner bearing spacers if needed).

suppliers.notes: V-Slot standard spacer 6mm, M5 bore — matches eccentric spacer OD
Standard 6mm spacer, M5 bore, matches V-wheel assembly kit
M5 bore aluminum standoff spacer 6mm length — verify 10mm OD to match wheel assembly

parts.name: 2040 Insert End Retainers (3D printed)
parts.description: Printed end retainers for the centered 2040 reinforcement inserts used inside 2m 4080 C-Beam X-direction members. The 2040 insert friction-fits with light pressure; retainers prevent migration without adhesive and keep the reinforcement method field-serviceable.

suppliers.notes: Print two retainers per reinforced 2m X-direction member; qty assumes 3 reinforced members for M3-2 and should track final spliced-member count.

notes: v2.2: all primary frame members use 4080 C-Beam; motor and idler mounts are printed; X-direction 2m members use centered 2040 friction-fit inserts with printed retainers; belt width reconciliation (Y/Z=10mm, X=6mm); wheel count confirmed at 32.
